name: SKELETON_TECHNOLOGYCLASS1__RANK_BY_PATENT_COUNT__TARGET_PAIR__ALL_TIME
macro_frame_family_zh: 按专利量排序的靶点对排名
description: Independent frame skeleton for ranking target pairs by patent count under a TechnologyClass1 constraint.
cypher_template:
MATCH (tc:TechnologyClass1 {name: $technologyclass1})<-[:HAS_TECHNOLOGY_CLASS1]-(tp:TargetPair)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)
RETURN tp.name AS target_pair, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count
ORDER BY patent_count DESC, target_pair
LIMIT 10
examples: Within the Trans-Bridging Immune Engagers TechnologyClass1 category, which target pairs have the most patents? Please return the top 10.
For the Tumor-Intrinsic Control TechnologyClass1 category, rank the target pairs by patent count and return the top 10.
Which target pairs in the Cytokine related functional combination TechnologyClass1 category have the most patents?
